def: The penis or clitoris, or the embryonic or primitive organ fromwhich either may be derived.
Smeared with bitumen. [R.] "The hatches caulked and bitumed."Shak.
Provided with a bed; as, double-bedded room; placed or arrangedin a bed or beds.

A genus of American and East Indian trees, of which the bestknow species are the Catalpa bignonioides, a large, ornamental NorthAmerican tree, with spotted white flowers and long cylindrical pods,and the C. speciosa, of the Mississipi valley; -- called also Indianbean.
The green papery fronds of several seaweeds of the genus Ulva,sometimes used as food.
A reddish fleshy herb of the genus Monotropa (M. hypopitys),formerly thought to be parasitic on the roots of pine trees, but moreprobably saprophytic.
Presage of coming ill; expectation of misfortune.
A suborder of Gephyræa, having a cylindrical body with aterminal anal opening, and usually with one or two caudal gills.
An amphibious, insectivorous mammal found in Russia (Myogalemoschata). It is allied to the moles, but is called muscrat by someEnglish writers. [Written also dæsman.]
